chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constitution Petition No.D-47 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections ‘A’. 2. For orders on M.A No.192/24 (E/A). 3. For hearing of main case. 28-10-2025 Mr. Shakeel Ahmed G.Ansari, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Oshaq Ali Sangi, Assistant Attorney General a/w Safdar Kamal, Law officer NADRA. ************* Learned counsel for petitioner files a statement along with certain documents, which is taken on record. He submits that the petitioner stood surety before this Court for accused Afzal Pathan in Criminal Bail Application No.S- 366/2016, bearing crime No.02/2016 for offence punishable under Section 9(b) CNS Act of PS Excise Town Shikarpur. The petitioner had deposited surety amount of Rs.1,00,000/- before this Court; however, surety papers were transmitted to the learned trial Court vide order dated 29.9.2016 and subsequently, during further proceedings, petitioner’s CNIC was blocked by NADRA on the directions of learned trial Court forfeiture the surety amount. In these circumstance petitioner’s counsel does not press the petition provided to approach the competent forum for unblocking petitioner’s CNIC. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Irshad Ali M/Steno
